title: New Gravel Burn cyclists tries out Gem of the Karoo
description: CYCLING NEWS - Twenty cyclists on a trial...
bodyText:
CYCLING NEWS - Twenty cyclists on a trial run for next year's inaugural Gravel Burn multistage gravel bike race from Knysna to Shamwari Game Reserve near Paterson, stopped over in Graaff-Reinet on Tuesday night.


> The cyclists left Knysna on Tuesday morning and spent the night in Graaff-Reinet before leaving for Blaauwater - the next spot to check out - this morning, Wednesday, 11 September.


But they did not hit the road before granting an exclusive, first media interview about the event to Graaff-Reinet Advertiser.

Read the full article on sister publication, Graaff-Reinet Advertiser

Richard Mac Martin.  Photos: Ben Snyman

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
